title: Slower than usual scale-ups for L4 GPUs

updates.message: A subset of models using L4 GPUs are experiencing slower than usual scale-ups and cold starts. We're actively investigating.
We've identified and fixed the issue. Currently monitoring the fix.
The issue has been resolved.

title: New deployments and replica scale ups timing out in certain regions

updates.message: The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented. Inference for currently running model replicas is unaffected.
A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results.
This incident has been resolved.

title: Elevated latencies for some models

updates.message: We are currently investigating this issue.
This incident has been resolved.

title: Elevated latencies on some models

updates.message: We are currently investigating this issue.
We are continuing to investigate this issue.
This incident has been resolved.

title: Intermittent errors with Baseten UI

updates.message: A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results.
This incident has been resolved.

title: Web app is inaccessible — inference is *not* affected

updates.message: We are currently investigating this issue.
We are continuing to investigate this issue.
Both the web app and the model management API are affected. Inference is *not* affected.
This is due to a DDOS attack. We are finding remediation.

Remediation is in place. Monitoring.

Again, inference was *not* affected.
The web application and the model management API are operational. We continue to monitor the situation.
This incident has been resolved.

title: Web app and non-inference API are intermittently down due to DDOS — inference is *not* affected

updates.message: We have a fix we're rolling out and monitoring
The API is back up, but we continue to monitor.
We are continuing to monitor for any further issues.
We've implemented a few layers of mitigation to handle this extended and ongoing DDOS. After hours of monitoring, the systems are stable right now.

title: Degradation in model builds

updates.message: New model builds are experiencing timeouts, preventing new models from being deployed. Existing model deploys and inference are not affected.
We've mitigated the impact on model builds and are still investigating the root issue. Existing model deploys and inference are not affected.
We are continuing to investigate this issue.
This incident has been resolved.

title: Degraded routing on a small subset of inference calls, affecting 3 customers.

updates.message: A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results.
We are continuing to monitor for any further issues.
We are continuing to monitor for any further issues.
This incident has been resolved.

title: Elevated GPU device failures in us-east

updates.message: We have noticed limited elevated GPU device failures on L4 nodes in one of our US-east clusters. We have identified the issue and have a fix in place, we are monitoring for any impact to models.
This incident has been resolved.

title: A few A100 nodes are failing. Recovery is in progress.

updates.message: This is due to a single cloud provider's unplanned outage, which is impacting our A100 fleet. Recovery onto other clouds is in progress.
The failover is complete.

title: Noticing elevated inference latencies in one cluster

updates.message: We're investigating the root cause.
We have identified the root cause: a networking issue within one cluster of one of our cloud providers.
Monitoring the fix that went in a few minutes ago.
Inference latencies are back to normal.

title: The main web application is not loading; inference is unaffected

updates.message: We are currently investigating this issue.
The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented.
We are continuing to work on a fix for this issue.
We are continuing to work on a fix for this issue.
A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results.
This incident has been resolved.

title: The web application and the model management API are having intermittent failures. Inference is *not* affected.

updates.message: We are currently investigating this issue.
The issue is root-caused and resolved.

title: Degraded performance only on Deepseek V3 0324

updates.message: This incident has been resolved.

title: Deepseek V3 API Operational

updates.message: Incident is resolved.

title: Major outage in GCP with partial impact on several customers

updates.message: GCP is experiencing an outage in multiple regions. We are in direct communication with GCP and bringing up capacity elsewhere as a mitigation.
Ongoing GCP outage, inference should not be affected.

All inference workloads are operational due to our multi-cloud capacity management. Information here: https://www.baseten.co/blog/how-baseten-multi-cloud-capacity-management-mcm-powers-cloud-self-hosted-and-hybr/

The fix is applied and the issue has been resolved.

title: GCP is reporting elevated packet loss in us-central1

updates.message: It affects p90 latencies for some models in us-central1, or if the caller is in us-central1. GCP is aware of the issue and investigating.
P90 latencies are back to normal. Still monitoring.
This incident has been resolved.

title: L4 capacity in single us-east region having issues

updates.message: We have identified an issue with some of our US-based L4 capacity. We are working on bringing up additional capacity elsewhere to serve the demand.
Workloads have been migrated to new capacity and we are monitoring the situation.
This incident has been resolved.

title: Build Infrastructure degraded due to Dockerhub outage

updates.message: An ongoing incident with Dockerhub registries is affecting new model builds. All existing models are unaffected.
We are continuing to monitor for any further issues.
This incident has been resolved.

title: High latency on Baseten Web Application and Model Management APIs. Inference is unaffected.

updates.message: We are seeing elevated latency across our Web Application and Rest APIs. Inference is unaffected.
The issue is resolved.

title: Baseten Web Application is down due to AWS outage. Inference is unaffected.

updates.message: Baseten web app is down due to the widespread AWS outage, but inference, new deploys, training jobs, and the model management APIs are unaffected.
Upstream provider has recovered, and the Baseten web app is available.

title: Login timing out on webapp

updates.message: New logins are not working due to an upstream auth provider outage. Existing logins are unaffected by this. Inference, new deploys, training jobs, and the model management APIs are also unaffected.

New logins continue not work due to issues with our upstream auth provider. Existing logins are unaffected by this. Inference, new deploys, training jobs, and the model management APIs are also unaffected.
The issue with our auth provider has been fixed, and logins work again.
